task_completion.description: The agent created the fingerprint_logger directory in the Talon user folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal, or editor tree view showing the folder `fingerprint_logger` inside `C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\`.

task_completion.description: The agent created the minutiae_logger.py file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or terminal showing a file named `minutiae_logger.py` being created or edited.

task_completion.description: The Python script defines the custom Talon action user.log_minutiae.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in `minutiae_logger.py` showing Talon API usage (like `@mod.action_class`) and a method definition for `def log_minutiae(feature: str):`.

task_completion.description: The Python script contains logic to append timestamp, mouse coordinates, and feature name to the CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in `minutiae_logger.py` showing file operations opening `C:\Evidence\latent_report.csv` in append mode, and writing a row containing a timestamp, mouse coordinates (e.g., using `ctrl.mouse_pos()`), and the feature name.

task_completion.description: The agent created the minutiae_logger.talon file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or terminal showing a file named `minutiae_logger.talon` being created or edited.

task_completion.description: The Talon script maps the required spoken commands to the log_minutiae action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in `minutiae_logger.talon` showing the exact commands mapped to the action, such as `tag bifurcation: user.log_minutiae('bifurcation')`, `tag ridge ending: ...`, `tag enclosure: ...`, `tag short ridge: ...`, `tag delta: ...`, and `tag core: ...`.

integrity.description: Verifies that the created files were actually saved to the disk.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor does not show an unsaved file indicator (like a dot or asterisk next to the filename), or terminal commands show successful file writes.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent wrote the code rather than copying a pre-existing completed script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent progressively typing or constructing the code in the editor.

integrity.description: Verifies that the files are placed in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths visible in the editor or terminal exactly match `C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\fingerprint_logger\`.
